meta.title: Ho Kenya Livideo - Kenya Livideo tsa Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Kenya livideo ho tswa Instagram, YouTube le Facebook mahala. Ha ho app e hlokahalang. Ka potlako le bobebe.

hero.badge: Mahala • Ha ho Kena • Ha ho App
hero.title: Sekenyi sa Livideo tsa Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Kenya Instagram Reels, Facebook le YouTube livideo ka potlako. Mahala, ka potlako, ha ho app e hlokahalang.
hero.placeholder: Beha mona sehokelo sa video ya hao...

howto.title: Mokhoa oa Ho Kenya Livideo
howto.step1_desc: Bula Instagram, YouTube kapa Facebook o kopitse sehokelo sa video.
howto.step2_desc: Beha sehokelo lebokosing le ka holimo o kgotle konopo ya Ho Kenya.
howto.step3_desc: Khetha boleng bo o bo batlang o boloke video setshabelong sa hao.

result.title: Video ya Hao e Lokile!
result.error: Ha ea kgona ho fumana video. Ka kopo sheba sehokelo o leke hape.
result.invalid_url: Ka kopo kenyelletsa sehokelo se nepahetseng sa Instagram, TikTok, Facebook kapa YouTube.

faq.title: Dipotso tse Botswang Hangata
faq.a1: Ee, mahala ka botlalo. Ha ho ngodiso kapa app e hlokahalang.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Dipalo, Stories), YouTube (Livideo, Shorts), le Facebook (Livideo, Reels).
faq.a3: Ee. Ha re boloke dihokelo kapa livideo tsa hao. Tsohle li sebetswa nako ya nnete.
faq.q4: Na nka kenya livideo tsa sephiri?
faq.a4: Tjhe. Livideo tsa sechaba feela li ka kenywa.

trending.title: Livideo tse Phahameng Bekeng Ena
trending.subtitle: Kgotle ho sheba ho YouTube • kopitsa sehokelo ho kenya

footer.tagline: Ho kenya livideo ka potlako le mahala ho tswa maphathisaneng a o a ratang.
footer.disclaimer: Sethemiswa sena ke sa tšebeliso ya motho ka mong feela. Ka kopo hlompha molao oa boitšoaro.
